summary: Project involves two components: (1) A children's story about hedgehog Shurshik helping find a lost lantern with a firefly, rabbit, and owl. (2) A cloud governance project labeled 'aaa' with March 10, 2026 deadline, focused on Azure infrastructure management. Cloud governance priorities include: cost optimization (idle VMs, orphaned disks, wasted spend), security (open ports, public storage, Defender alerts), compliance (tag governance, policy violations, RBAC), and reliability (backup coverage, monitoring gaps, resource health). User has 273 Azure subscriptions accessible to their account, including Microsoft Azure Enterprise, VIAcode platform subscriptions, HSP environment subscriptions, and EPS production subscriptions. User confirmed readiness to proceed with Azure environment scanning. No scanning or governance actions initiated yet. Recent inquiry focused on the 'Partner Benefit 5 6k 2025' subscription, which contains AKS infrastructure: two AKS clusters detected (agenticit-prod-aks in East US and agenticit-stg-aks in staging), identified through their managed resource groups rather than direct resource listings.
key_facts: User has access to 273 Azure subscriptions
Key priorities: cost optimization, security, compliance, reliability
Partner Benefit 5 6k 2025 subscription contains 2 AKS clusters
AKS clusters: agenticit-prod-aks (East US) and agenticit-stg-aks (staging)
No governance scanning or actions initiated yet
AKS clusters detected via managed resource groups
